subcodes.first_line: Hast thou heard the Path speak? Say: Yea, by my Lord! It hath appeared in truth and speaketh at all times: "There is no God" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل سمعت الصراط ینطق قل ای و ربی قد ظهر بالحق و ینطق فی کل الاحیان انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @firmness in the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
